title: Welsh Shepherd's Pie
description: A classic British dish featuring tender lamb and bulgur topped with a crispy mashed potato crust.
instructions: Cook lamb in a large pan over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as needed.
Add onion and carrots to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in bulgur and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Transfer lamb mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Make mashed potatoes by boiling diced potatoes in a large pot of salted water until tender.
Drain potatoes and mash with milk, butter, and salt and pepper to taste.
Spread mashed potatoes over the lamb mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
